channel.title: aleksas on Aleksas Mazeliauskas
channel.description: Recent content in aleksas on Aleksas Mazeliauskas

item.description: I am a theoretical physicist at Heidelberg University. I have a joint postdoctoral research position in the groups of Prof. Dr. Jürgen Berges and Priv.-Doz. Dr. Stefan Flörchinger at the Institute for Theoretical Physics under the collaborative research project SFB 1225 ISOQUANT. I am interested in out-of-equilibrium quantum systems. Recently I have been working on the early time dynamics and equilibrations in heavy ion collisions. I use QCD kinetic theory, relativistic hydrodynamics and other methods to infer the properties of Quark Gluon Plasma.
